subcodes.first_line: O true servant of the Blessed Beauty! The effect of the musk-laden pen hath perfumed my senses with the heart-entrancing fragrance from the rose-garden of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حقیقی جمال مبارک اثر کلک مشکبار مشامرا معطر از بوی دلجوی گلشن محبت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for parents, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
